claim_bullets.bullet_text: Game master manages NPC and monster actions in combat (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.138-138).
Combat in special situations applies penalties or bonuses to attack power or evasion speed (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.139-139).
Surprise attacks depend on game master's judgment and use a check table (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.140-140).

source_record_text: Chapter 10.3-10.6 of Sword World RPG - Complete Edition covers surprise attacks, combat in special situations, and combat between monsters.
